shifts.text: Reinforcements arrive in one zone — the GM picks which. It becomes crowded or closed.
A path between two zones is blocked — debris, a locked door, an angry crowd.
A zone changes from obstacle to open — something clears, a door swings wide, the crowd thins.
A new witness or bystander appears in one zone and will raise the alarm if not dealt with.
An environmental hazard flares — fire, flood, collapse — making one zone dangerous to pass through.
A noise or signal draws pursuers toward a specific zone. They converge there next round.
The weather or light changes — rain, fog, gathering dark. Sightlines shorten across the whole map.
A creature or person reveals themselves in one zone, friendly, hostile, or ambiguous.
Something valuable is spotted in a zone — it would be a real loss to leave it behind.
A shortcut opens between two zones that weren't previously connected. Only briefly.
